{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230458099F198E2F09FB2B102D8E"}"},"total":824},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7195809922511766331","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"又一本，3亿2千3百97万字等。个人：我还是看得下去的，别的人估计不是跳的看，就是看了一下开头直接看结尾了。我从中看到了，生活本来就是柴米酱油醋，简简单单的过生活。虽然故事猪脚不差钱。。。。。。还有，作者想骗我们生女儿[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]（在此，不需要负责的小姐姐可以@我，[奸笑][害羞][奸笑][害羞][奸笑]我愿为计划生育做贡献）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675405186,"group_id":"6945363932206861320","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3GJDGc73vU1MmduUo5Zpv00Y9j2N/KWh8B2QidiBQXz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/4b03527b1d3f43ef835b1c85d2b96415~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790046&x-signature=4hs1N00bOUxpXv75W%2BSH5pFnwUw%3D","user_id":"1055135637189575","user_name":"小海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1055135637189575","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6945363932206861320","book_info":{"abstract":"异界寂寞无敌的主宰帝主，千辛万苦重新回归地球。
　　自己的父母爱人都已逝去，本来心灰意冷的他，发现自己在地球上还有一个血脉相连的女儿！
　　于是，至高无上的帝主大人，当起了一名超级奶爸！
　　女儿想养猫，他直接收服一头虎妖当做宠物猫......
　　女儿被人欺负，他直接上门灭了人家满门......
